title: Scroll Studies
description: Three independent 9:21 vertical scroll studies testing continuous scene planning, dense local detail, and stable extreme framing.
creative_direction: Each image is a complete vertical scroll rather than a series dependency: one city lane, one terrain map, and one life timeline, all built for dense visual scanning.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Scroll Studies
en.description: Three independent 9:21 vertical scroll studies testing continuous scene planning, dense local detail, and stable extreme framing.

zh-CN.title: 长卷单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立 9:21 竖卷图，测试连续场景规划、高密度细节和极端画幅稳定性。
